ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare

benefit.en: Direct income support of rupees 6,000 per year, in three equal installments
benefit.hi: तीन समान किस्तों में सालाना 6,000 रुपये की प्रत्यक्ष आय सहायता

eligibility_rules_human: Any landholding farmer family in India whose name appears in state land records, subject to exclusions (institutional landholders, constitutional post holders, serving or retired government employees, professionals, income-tax payers).

application_paths.offline_office_pattern: Common Service Center (CSC) or village patwari office
offline_steps: Visit nearest CSC or village patwari with documents
Submit Aadhaar, bank details, and land record
